market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Securitize and tZERO clash over patents as race to bring Wall Street onchain heats up
articles.description: tZERO and Securitize are squaring off over tokenization patents as the market attracts more of Wall Street's attention.

articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Ric Edelman says crypto’s biggest growth story is happening off the price chart
articles.description: Crypto prices remain under pressure, but Ric Edelman says institutional adoption and tokenization are accelerating behind the scenes.

articles.title: 21Shares co-founder warns tokenization hype is outrunning Wall Street reality
articles.description: Tokenization can improve settlement and asset movement, but key pieces of financial infrastructure remain unprepared for institutional-scale adoption.

articles.title: The AI world is getting ‘loopy’
articles.description: The loop takes agentic AI a step further, by authorizing a swarm of agents to work continuously in the background, endlessly.

articles.title: Microsoft and Chevron plan one of the largest gas-powered data center projects in US
articles.description: Microsoft inked a 20-year power purchase agreement with Chevron, locking in decades of carbon emissions from a new natural gas power plant.

articles.title: Franklin Templeton launches dedicated crypto division after closing 250 Digital acquisition
articles.description: The new unit arrives amid rapid growth in tokenized assets, with Franklin Templeton's onchain product suite expanding from roughly $768 million to more than $2.5 billion over the past year.

articles.title: Strive says digital credit selloff was a liquidation event, not a credit crisis
articles.description: A sharp selloff in digital credit products exposed growing pains in a young market, a Strive executive argues the underlying credit fundamentals remain intact.

articles.title: AI chipmaker Groq confirms $650M raise, re-staffs after Nvidia’s $20B not-acqui-hire deal
articles.description: What does an AI company do after one of those not-acqui-hire deals? Groq raised money, is leaning into its neocloud business, and is hiring new execs.

articles.title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
articles.description: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

articles.title: New York, Maryland and Utah to hold primaries with crypto PAC money hanging over voters
articles.description: Crypto-backed PACs disclosed spending more than $8 million on media to support candidates in three US states, as some Maryland Democrats have called on one candidate to reject “outside spending from crypto billionaires.”

articles.title: Tata Electronics, a major tech supplier to Apple and Tesla, confirms data breach
articles.description: The incident comes as Tata Electronics expands its role in global technology supply chains.

articles.title: Ether’s biggest corporate holders back new Ethereum research hub
articles.description: Ethlabs was formed with support from SharpLink, Bitmine and Consensys CEO Joe Lubin as the network's development is expanding beyond the Ethereum Foundation.

articles.title: Solana grabs 95% of tokenized equity as traders debate if SOL bottom is in
articles.description: Solana captured 95% of tokenized equity volumes as analysts debate whether $60 was the bottom for SOL.

articles.title: A new unpatchable flaw in Apple chips opens the door to an iPhone jailbreak
articles.description: European offensive cybersecurity company Paradigm Shift released details of a flaw and a technique to exploit it that opens the door for hackers to unlock and break into older iPhones.

articles.title: Google DeepMind bets $75M on AI’s future in Hollywood with A24 deal
articles.description: Google DeepMind and A24 are teaming up to build AI filmmaking tools.

articles.title: Anthropic says Claude may want to see your ID
articles.description: Claude's chatbot may ask to verify your age and identity "in certain circumstances," such as with a passport or driver's license, according to a privacy policy change.

articles.title: Amazon is testing Alexa+ in India with Hindi support
articles.description: Amazon is planning to increase the footprint of its new conversational AI assistant Alexa+ to India and is inviting users in the country to test out a Hindi-language version.

articles.title: Andrew Cuomo to lead joint TradFi-crypto venture between OKX and Intercontinental Exchange
articles.description: The venture is subject to regulatory approvals but will be co-chaired by ICE and former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo, who began working with OKX in 2023.

articles.title: Bitcoin weekly close above $63K amid RSI divergence may be bottom signal: Data
articles.description: Bitcoin's repeated weekly candle close above $63,000 align with signals that may mark a market bottom.
